pageDescription: Discover why I decided to torture myself building a PHP engine in C#.
content: [{"id":"c81e6992-ef93-4aed-9fab-0ce97ab59172","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Over the last few months, I’ve been obsessed with the .NET CLR. I already understood the basics of IL, but I was itching for a reason to dig deeper. That reason came in the form of a personal challenge: I decided I was going to build a Language Runtime. ","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"691b548d-3f42-45e7-84ea-3c53244fa03f","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I had previously teamed up with a good friend and ex-colleague on a project called TS.Net, designed to work alongside SocialStack to enable lightning-fast server-side rendering. As we moved to TypeScript and adopted stricter typing, we realized we might be able to drop the V8 engine because, when it comes to memory, V8 is a bit of a hungry beast.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"6fefe76c-e189-4044-a655-ba01cbf89fe2","component":"Text","data":{"content":"We set out on a mission to write a static TypeScript engine, a side project that aimed to run TypeScript directly on the CLR. My colleague led the charge and I played a supporting role, but I wanted to build something like this myself too. The experience and lessons that came with it were exactly what I was after.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f996eb1e-e9e9-4a85-b750-47d5ef126885","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I knew how complex TypeScript syntax could be, and thought to try a simpler syntax set, and decided since I've already worked with PHP, could I write my own engine, and benchmark it against PHP, see which runs faster. This is how the PHP runtime project came to exist.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]
